lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner — used to lay out the mining suite, ore racks and shield against the real slot list.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Corvette ship page — manufacturer specs and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hardpoint sizes, optional and military slot layout, and shield/armour/mass figures used for the mining loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Corvette
sources.what: Ship overview: cargo capacity, internals layout, shipyard price and the Federal rank requirement quoted in Cost & Access.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Federal Corvette lore, Core Dynamics manufacturer and the hull's standing as a Federal-navy capstone.
